name: Tax & Regulatory Compliance Validation Workflow (Procurement & Finance Industry)

messageValues.message: You are a high-precision invoice data extraction engine. Extract structured fields. Special Rule: Look for the terms 'SEZ', 'Special Economic Zone', 'LUT', or 'Bond' in the address or footer. If found, set a field 'is_sez' to true, otherwise false. Fields: invoice_number, po_number, grn_number, supplier_name, supplier_email, invoice_date, currency, total_amount, tax_amount, line_items (item, quantity, unit_price, hsn_code), is_sez (boolean).

parameters.content:
## Invoice Intake & Extraction Description
Monitors the finance inbox to capture incoming PDF invoices via email. It extracts raw text and uses AI to transform unstructured data into a precise, validated JSON schema.

## External Context Retrieval
Simultaneously queries your Procurement database and Tax Registry. This gathers the specific Purchase Order details and the latest regulatory tax rules required for a three-way match.

## The Compliance Gate
The core intelligence segment. It compares invoice data against PO limits and tax laws, then logs every transaction into a permanent audit trail for fiscal transparency.

## Final Disposition & Response
Based on the engine’s verdict, this segment either authorizes payment and archives the file or blocks the process and notifies the supplier of specific violations.

  • Issue a corrected invoice addressing the tax/regulatory discrepancies.
  • Provide supporting documentation (e.g., a valid SEZ certificate or LUT declaration) if applicable.
  • Resubmit the documentation directly to this email thread.

This is an automated message from the AP Automation Compliance Firewall.
© 2026 Your Company Name - Accounts Payable Department
parameters.subject: =RE: Invoice Compliance Issue - {{ $('AI Extract Invoice').item.json.output.invoice_number }}

parameters.content:
## Workflow Overview: Tax & Regulatory Compliance Validation

This workflow acts as an automated **Compliance Firewall** for the accounts payable process. It extracts data from PDF invoices received via email, performs a three-way match against procurement records in Google Sheets, and validates tax accuracy against Notion-based regulatory standards. By automating the detection of price creep, currency mismatches, and tax errors, it ensures every payment is audit-ready and fiscally compliant.

## How it works
This workflow acts as an automated **Compliance Firewall** for your finance department. It automatically monitors your inbox, uses AI to extract data from PDF invoices, and cross-references that data with your approved Purchase Orders and tax laws.
If the invoice matches your budget and tax rules, the system archives it and notifies your team. If it fails, the workflow blocks the payment, logs the error, and instantly emails the supplier a detailed rejection notice so they can fix and resubmit it.

## Setup Steps
**Monitor Inbox** — Start the workflow when a new invoice email is received.
**Extract PDF Text** — Convert the binary attachment into a readable text format.
**AI Data Extractor** — Transform unstructured text into a structured JSON schema using LLMs.
**Fetch PO from Sheets** — Verify the PO exists and check its approval status and budget limit.
**Retrieve Notion Tax Rules** — Load live regulatory standards and HSN-specific tax rates.
**Verify Tax & Budget** — Execute the core logic to detect mismatches in currency, price, or tax.
**Log Audit Entry** — Store the pass/fail results and matched rules in the Notion Audit Log.
**Check: Pass or Fail?** — Route the workflow based on the compliance engine's final status.
**Save Approved Invoice** — Archive compliant files to the authorized Google Drive folder.
**Email Supplier Rejection** — Automatically notify the vendor of violations if processing is blocked.
